# Vendored upstream: addyosmani/agent-skills

This directory contains skills imported verbatim from
[addyosmani/agent-skills](https://github.com/addyosmani/agent-skills).

**Do not edit files here directly.** Local customizations belong in the
top-level `skills/` directory, which takes precedence over this vendor copy
when skill names collide.

See [docs/UPSTREAM-SKILLS.md](../../docs/UPSTREAM-SKILLS.md) for the pinned
upstream commit, the update procedure, and the modification policy.
